name: Vegetable Rice Pilaf (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 3 celery stalks, chopped into bite-sized pieces
1 large sweet red pepper, sliced into strips
1 large green pepper, sliced into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions, omitting butter, margarine, or oil.
2. While the rice is cooking, prepare all the vegetables.
3. Spray a large skillet with vegetable spray.
4. Saute onion and garlic until tender, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the remaining vegetables (celery, tomato, red pepper, green pepper) to the skillet and sprinkle with black pepper to taste.
6. Continue cooking until all vegetables are tender, about 5 more minutes. Stir occasionally.
7. Once the vegetables are cooked, add the cooked rice to the vegetable blend and stir to combine.
8. Serve hot, garnished with a sprig of parsley and black pepper.
Yield: 4 servings
Serving size: 1 cup
Calories per serving: 130
